title: Update congress page: default to latest, add floating music bar

log.context: Update congress page: default to latest, add floating music bar

Both changes are live. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Change 1 — Auto-load latest session**

In the `init()` function's `else` branch (no `?session=` URL param), instead of showing "select a session from the sidebar", the page now fetches `/api/congress/sessions`, sorts them the same way the sidebar does (deliberating first, then descending session number), and automatically calls `loadSessionIntoPage()` with the top result. If no sessions exist, it shows a helpful prompt.
